title: Rhaygood
compiled_truth: Rhaygood is an external contact at [Darbylaw](companies/darbylaw). Over the corpus period (2000-11-10 to 2001-11-12), Rhaygood sent 4 and received 23 emails, totalling 27 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tori Kuykendall](people/tori-kuykendall) (2), [Tkuyken](people/tkuyken) (1).
